query:
SELECT c.id as client_id, c.name as client_name, c.email as client_email,
       sp.id as package_id, sp.packageType, sp.sessionsTotal
FROM clients c
JOIN session_packages sp ON sp.clientId = c.id
WHERE c.trainerId = 13
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL
  AND c.email != ''
LIMIT 5;
